title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 17 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 17 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 17 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures market roseing sharply trends, The main contract I2409 closed at 891.5. an increase of 2.28% throughout the day .some traders were active to sell; Inquiries from steel mills have decreased, resulting in poor purchasing enthusiasm. PBF at Shandong port dealt 885-890 yuan/mt; increased 15 -20 yuan/mt over yesterday.
